summary.goodPoints: 교재 개념 페이지를 캡처하여 체계적으로 정리하는 학습 습관이 좋습니다. 관계대명사+be동사 생략 → 분사구 전환 공식, 부사 역할의 구/절 구분 등 편입 핵심 문법을 능동적으로 학습 중입니다.
summary.badPoints: 오늘은 개념 정리 위주 학습이었으므로, 배운 개념을 실전 문제에 적용하는 연습이 필요합니다. 아래 연습문제 60문제로 개념을 확실히 다져봅시다.
summary.priority: 관계대명사 선택 → 분사구문↔관계사절 전환 → 부사구/절 접속사 식별

weakAreas.note: 구와 절의 차이를 정확히 이해해야 전환 가능
접속사 vs 전치사, so that vs so…that 구분

conceptQuestions.title: 관계사절과 관계대명사 선택
conceptQuestions.explanation:
핵심 개념: 관계대명사의 종류와 선택 기준

관계대명사는 선행사의 종류와 절 안에서의 역할에 따라 선택한다.

관계대명사선행사역할예문
who사람주어The man who called you is my boss.
whom사람목적어The girl whom I met was kind.
which사물/동물주어/목적어The car which I bought is red.
that사람/사물주어/목적어The movie that we watched was great.
whose사람/사물소유격The boy whose father is a doctor…
when시간부사The day when I met her was special.
where장소부사The city where I was born is small.

판별법: 3단계 선택 전략

  1. 선행사 확인 → 사람? 사물? 시간? 장소?
  2. 관계사절 내 빈자리 확인 → 주어? 목적어? 소유격? 부사?
  3. 제한적 vs 계속적 용법 → 콤마(,) 유무 확인. 콤마 뒤에는 that 불가!

주의: that을 쓸 수 없는 경우

  • 콤마(,) 뒤의 계속적 용법: My car, which is red, … (that 불가)
  • 전치사 바로 뒤: the house in which I live (in that 불가)
examples: The man who called you is my boss. → 선행사: man(사람), 역할: 주어 → who
The car which I bought is red. → 선행사: car(사물), 역할: 목적어 → which/that
The boy whose father is a doctor studies hard. → 소유격 → whose
The day when I met her was special. → 선행사: day(시간), 역할: 부사 → when
exampleSentences: I know the girl who won the contest. (나는 그 대회에서 우승한 소녀를 안다.)
This is the book which changed my life. (이것이 내 인생을 바꾼 책이다.)
The house whose roof is red belongs to my uncle. (지붕이 빨간 집은 삼촌 것이다.)
Do you remember the place where we first met? (우리가 처음 만난 장소를 기억하니?)
conceptQuestions.confusionPoints:
자주 헷갈리는 포인트

  • who vs whom: 절 안에서 주어면 who, 목적어면 whom. 헷갈리면 he/him으로 대입 → he가 맞으면 who, him이 맞으면 whom
  • which vs that: 대부분 호환 가능하지만, 콤마 뒤(계속적 용법)에서는 which만 가능
  • that vs what: that은 선행사가 있고, what은 선행사를 포함(= the thing which)
  • where vs which: 장소 선행사여도 절 안에 전치사가 없으면 which/that (The city that I visited → 목적어 빈자리)

practiceProblems.sentence: The teacher ______ taught us math retired last year.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 teacher(사람), 관계사절 내 주어 빈자리 → who

practiceProblems.sentence: The book ______ you recommended was excellent.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 book(사물), 관계사절 내 목적어 빈자리 → which (that도 가능)

practiceProblems.sentence: The student ______ essay won the prize is my friend.
practiceProblems.explanation: essay 앞의 소유격 빈자리 → whose (= the student's essay)

practiceProblems.sentence: I remember the day ______ we graduated from college.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 day(시간), 관계사절 내 시간 부사 역할 → when

practiceProblems.sentence: She is the person ______ I spoke to on the phone.
practiceProblems.explanation: 전치사 to의 목적어 빈자리(사람) → whom

practiceProblems.sentence: The hotel ______ we stayed was near the beach.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 hotel(장소), 관계사절 내 장소 부사 역할(stayed at the hotel) → where

practiceProblems.sentence: My sister, ______ lives in Paris, is visiting next week.
practiceProblems.explanation: 콤마+사람+주어 역할 → who (계속적 용법이므로 that 불가)

practiceProblems.sentence: The reason ______ he was late is still unknown.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 reason → 관계부사 why

practiceProblems.sentence: This is the house in ______ I grew up.
practiceProblems.explanation: 전치사 in 바로 뒤 → which (in that은 불가)

practiceProblems.sentence: The woman ______ bag was stolen reported it to the police.
practiceProblems.explanation: bag 앞의 소유격 → whose (= the woman's bag)

practiceProblems.sentence: Everything ______ he said turned out to be true.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 everything(부정대명사) → that만 가능 (which 불가)

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ surprised me was his sudden resignation.
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 없음 + 주어절 → what (= the thing which)

practiceProblems.sentence: The city ______ I visited last summer was beautiful.
practiceProblems.explanation: 장소 선행사지만 visited의 목적어 빈자리 → which/that (where 아님!)

practiceProblems.sentence: He has two sons, both of ______ are doctors.
practiceProblems.explanation: 전치사 of의 목적어(사람) + 콤마(계속적 용법) → whom

practiceProblems.sentence: The movie, ______ was directed by Bong Joon-ho, won an Oscar.
practiceProblems.explanation: 콤마+사물+주어 역할 → which (계속적 용법이므로 that 불가)

practiceProblems.sentence: The man ______ car was parked illegally received a fine.
practiceProblems.explanation: car 앞 소유격 → whose

practiceProblems.sentence: Is there anything ______ I can do for you?
practiceProblems.explanation: 선행사 anything(부정대명사) → that만 가능

practiceProblems.sentence: The way ______ she solved the problem impressed everyone.
practiceProblems.explanation: the way how는 불가 → the way in which 또는 the way (that)

practiceProblems.sentence: She married a man ______ she had met only twice.
practiceProblems.explanation: met의 목적어(사람) → whom

practiceProblems.sentence: The company, for ______ he works, is based in Seoul.
practiceProblems.explanation: 전치사 for + 사물(company) + 계속적 용법(콤마) → which

conceptQuestions.title: 분사구문 ↔ 관계사절 전환
conceptQuestions.explanation:
핵심 개념: 분사구(구) vs 관계사절(절)

분사구문은 관계사절에서 관계대명사 + be동사를 생략한 축약형이다.

분사구문 (구)관계사절 (절)
The boy sitting on the benchThe boy who is sitting on the bench
The letter written in EnglishThe letter which was written in English
Department, long reputed to be…Department, which has long been reputed to be…

전환 공식

  1. 능동 (현재분사 -ing): 관계대명사 + be + V-ing → V-ing만 남김
    who is sitting → sitting
  2. 수동 (과거분사 p.p.): 관계대명사 + be + p.p. → p.p.만 남김
    which was written → written
  3. 완료 분사: 관계대명사 + have + p.p. → having p.p.
    who has finished → having finished

편입 빈출 포인트

분사의 능동/수동 판별이 핵심! 수식받는 명사와의 관계를 확인:

  • 명사가 동작을 하면 → 현재분사(-ing): a sleeping baby
  • 명사가 동작을 당하면 → 과거분사(p.p.): a broken window
examples: The girl standing by the door = The girl who is standing by the door (능동 → -ing)
The report submitted yesterday = The report which was submitted yesterday (수동 → p.p.)
Anyone wanting to join should apply. = Anyone who wants to join should apply.
The bridge built in 1990 is now closed. = The bridge which was built in 1990 is now closed.
exampleSentences: 문 옆에 서 있는 소녀 → The girl standing by the door
어제 제출된 보고서 → The report submitted yesterday
영어로 쓰인 편지 → The letter written in English
벤치에 앉아 있는 소년 → The boy sitting on the bench
conceptQuestions.confusionPoints:
자주 헷갈리는 포인트

  • 현재분사(-ing) vs 과거분사(p.p.): 능동/수동 판별이 핵심. "exciting news(흥분시키는)" vs "excited people(흥분된)"
  • 분사구문의 위치: 명사 바로 뒤 → 형용사적 후치수식 / 문장 앞·뒤 → 부사적 분사구문
  • 관계대명사+be 생략 조건: be동사가 있어야 생략 가능. The man who likes coffee → liking 단순 전환 불가
  • 완료 분사 vs 단순 분사: 시제 차이가 있으면 having p.p. 사용

practiceProblems.sentence: The man ______ at the bus stop is my uncle.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The man who is waiting → 능동 현재분사 waiting

practiceProblems.sentence: The documents ______ by the manager need revision.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The documents which were signed → 수동 과거분사 signed

practiceProblems.sentence: The students ______ in the project will receive extra credit.
practiceProblems.explanation: students가 프로젝트에 '관련된(당한)' 상태 → 수동 과거분사 involved

practiceProblems.sentence: The woman ______ the red dress is a famous actress.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The woman who is wearing → 능동 현재분사 wearing

practiceProblems.sentence: The package ______ to the wrong address was returned.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The package which was delivered → 수동 과거분사 delivered

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ all the work, she went home early.
practiceProblems.explanation: 일을 끝낸 것(완료)이 집에 간 것보다 먼저 → having p.p.

practiceProblems.sentence: The language ______ in Brazil is Portuguese.
practiceProblems.explanation: language가 '사용되는' 것 → 수동 과거분사 spoken

practiceProblems.sentence: Anyone ______ to participate should register by Friday.
practiceProblems.explanation: = Anyone who wishes → 능동 현재분사 wishing

practiceProblems.sentence: The email ______ this morning contained important information.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The email which was received → 수동 과거분사 received

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ from the top of the mountain, the city looked tiny.
practiceProblems.explanation: the city가 '보이는' 대상(수동) → 과거분사 Seen

practiceProblems.sentence: The girl ______ next to me in class is very smart.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The girl who is sitting → 능동 현재분사 sitting

practiceProblems.sentence: The road ______ to the village is very narrow.
practiceProblems.explanation: road가 '이끄는' 주체(능동) → 현재분사 leading

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ not what to say, he remained silent.
practiceProblems.explanation: he가 '모르는' 주체(능동) + 부정 → Not knowing

practiceProblems.sentence: The car ______ in the accident was towed away.
practiceProblems.explanation: car가 '손상된' 대상(수동) → 과거분사 damaged

practiceProblems.sentence: The children ______ in the park seemed very happy.
practiceProblems.explanation: = The children who were playing → 능동 현재분사 playing

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ by the news, she burst into tears.
practiceProblems.explanation: she가 '충격받은' 대상(감정 수동) → 과거분사 Shocked

practiceProblems.sentence: The concert ______ last night was a huge success.
practiceProblems.explanation: concert가 '개최된' 대상(수동) → 과거분사 held

practiceProblems.sentence: There is a woman ______ to see you at the front desk.
practiceProblems.explanation: = a woman who is waiting → 능동 현재분사 waiting

practiceProblems.sentence: The policy ______ by the government was widely criticized.
practiceProblems.explanation: policy가 '채택된' 대상(수동) → 과거분사 adopted

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ in 1960, the building is now a historical landmark.
practiceProblems.explanation: the building이 '지어진' 대상(수동) → 과거분사 Built

conceptQuestions.title: 부사 역할을 하는 구와 절
conceptQuestions.explanation:
핵심 개념: 부사 역할의 구 vs 절

부사는 동사, 형용사, 다른 부사, 문장 전체를 수식한다. '구'는 주어+동사가 없고, '절'은 주어+동사가 있다.

부사구 (주어+동사 없음)부사절 (주어+동사 있음)
to부정사구: To pass the exam, he studied hard.시간절: When he arrived, I was sleeping.
전치사구: Despite the rain, we went out.조건절: If it rains, we will stay home.
분사구문: Walking home, I saw a cat.양보절: Although he tried, he failed.
이유절: Because she was tired, she left early.
목적절: He saved money so that he could travel.
결과절: It was so cold that the lake froze.

부사절 접속사 핵심 정리

기능접속사
시간when, while, before, after, until, since, as soon as, once
조건if, unless, provided (that), as long as, in case
양보although, though, even though, even if, while
이유because, since, as, now that
목적so that, in order that, lest
결과so … that, such … that

편입 빈출: 부사절 → 분사구문 전환

접속사 + 주어 + 동사 → (접속사 생략) + 분사
Because he was tired, he left. → Being tired, he left. → Tired, he left.
examples: To improve his English, he watched American dramas. (to부정사구 — 목적)
Despite the heavy traffic, she arrived on time. (전치사구 — 양보)
Walking along the river, I found a beautiful park. (분사구문 — 동시동작)
Although it was expensive, she bought the bag. (부사절 — 양보)
exampleSentences: 시험에 합격하기 위해 그는 열심히 공부했다. → To pass the exam, he studied hard.
비가 옴에도 불구하고 우리는 외출했다. → Despite the rain, we went out.
그가 도착했을 때 나는 자고 있었다. → When he arrived, I was sleeping.
너무 피곤해서 그녀는 일찍 떠났다. → Because she was tired, she left early.
conceptQuestions.confusionPoints:
자주 헷갈리는 포인트

  • because vs because of: because + 절(S+V), because of + 명사(구)
  • although vs despite: although + 절, despite + 명사(구)
  • so that(목적) vs so…that(결과): He studied hard so that he could pass.(목적) / He was so tired that he fell asleep.(결과)
  • if vs unless: unless = if … not
  • while(시간) vs while(양보): 문맥으로 판단. "While I was eating(시간)" vs "While I agree with you(양보)"

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ it was raining heavily, we decided to cancel the picnic.
practiceProblems.explanation: 뒤에 절(it was raining) + 이유 → Because

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ the bad weather, the event was held outdoors.
practiceProblems.explanation: 뒤에 명사구(the bad weather) + 양보 → Despite

practiceProblems.sentence: She studied abroad ______ she could improve her language skills.
practiceProblems.explanation: 목적(~하기 위해) → so that + could

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ you finish your homework, you cannot go out.
practiceProblems.explanation: 숙제를 끝내지 않으면(= if you don't finish) → Unless

practiceProblems.sentence: He was ______ tired ______ he fell asleep during the meeting.
practiceProblems.explanation: so + 형용사(tired) + that + 절 → 결과 구문

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ arriving at the station, she realized she had left her ticket at home.
practiceProblems.explanation: Upon + V-ing = ~하자마자(= As soon as she arrived)

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ he apologized, she refused to forgive him.
practiceProblems.explanation: 사과했음에도 용서 안 함 → 양보 Even though

practiceProblems.sentence: I'll wait here ______ you come back.
practiceProblems.explanation: 네가 돌아올 때까지 → until + 절

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ his lack of experience, he performed remarkably well.
practiceProblems.explanation: 뒤에 명사구(his lack) + 양보 → In spite of (= Despite)

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ the sun sets, the temperature drops rapidly.
practiceProblems.explanation: 해가 지면(일단 ~하면) → Once + 절

practiceProblems.sentence: Take an umbrella ______ it rains.
practiceProblems.explanation: 비가 올 경우를 대비해서 → in case

practiceProblems.sentence: She left early ______ avoid the rush-hour traffic.
practiceProblems.explanation: to부정사구(목적): ~하기 위해 → in order to + 동사원형

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ working on the project, he discovered a major error.
practiceProblems.explanation: While + V-ing(분사구문) = ~하는 동안. During은 명사 앞에만 사용

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ she is young, she has a lot of experience.
practiceProblems.explanation: 젊음에도 경험 많음 → 양보 Although

practiceProblems.sentence: He spoke slowly ______ everyone could understand him.
practiceProblems.explanation: 모두가 이해할 수 있도록(목적) → so that

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ I was having dinner, the phone rang.
practiceProblems.explanation: 뒤에 절(I was having) + 시간(~하는 동안) → While

practiceProblems.sentence: It was ______ a difficult exam ______ most students failed.
practiceProblems.explanation: such + a(n) + 형용사 + 명사 + that → 결과 구문

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ you study hard, you will not pass the exam.
practiceProblems.explanation: 열심히 공부하지 않으면(= If you don't) → Unless

practiceProblems.sentence: He saved money ______ he could buy a new laptop.
practiceProblems.explanation: 새 노트북을 살 수 있도록(목적) → in order that (= so that)

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ rich he may be, he cannot buy happiness.
practiceProblems.explanation: However + 형용사 + S + V = 아무리 ~해도 (양보의 부사절)

grammarTopics.title: 구(Phrase)와 절(Clause)의 근본적 차이
grammarTopics.content:
구 vs 절: 핵심 구분법

구 (Phrase)절 (Clause)
정의주어+동사 없이 의미 단위를 이루는 어구주어+동사를 포함하는 의미 단위
예시sitting on the bench (분사구)who is sitting on the bench (관계사절)
독립성문장 성분으로만 기능독립절은 혼자 문장 가능

편입에서 묻는 포인트

  1. 밑줄 친 부분의 문법적 기능 → 구인지 절인지 판별
  2. 구 ↔ 절 전환 → 같은 의미를 구로/절로 바꾸기
  3. 접속사/관계사 선택 → 절을 이끄는 적절한 연결어

빠른 판별법

밑줄 친 부분에 주어+동사가 보이면 절, 보이지 않으면 구!

  • to부정사구: to + 동사원형 (주어 없음) → 구
  • 분사구문: V-ing / p.p. (주어 없음) → 구
  • 전치사구: 전치사 + 명사 → 구
  • 관계사절: 관계사 + S + V → 절
  • 부사절: 접속사 + S + V → 절
